response:
Certainly! Here's a revised version of your email in English, with PII removed and replaced with generic placeholders:

---

Subject: Confirmation of Compliance System Training

Dear [Recipient's Name],

Thank you for your response. We have invited you to attend a compliance system training session. Please select one of the two times below to attend:

- 14:00 - 15:00  
- 16:00 - 17:00  

The training will be held at [Tearms] on [Date], and it will be conducted in English. We kindly ask you to attend at your convenience and confirm your choice by [Confirmation Deadline].

Thank you for your attention.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]  

---

Let me know if you'd like to adjust the tone or add more details!
